reviews.review_msg: Great prof-  He makes this class the easiest one you'll take in 3rd year.  3 hour lectures are a bit rough to sit through though.
Make sure to study his slides. His exams are based on those only. Don't even have to read the text! Easy class, nice prof :)
I like Bill! He is very good at explaining things and his slides lay everything out in a clear, easy to understand format. However, I did try to go to his office hours and he was a complete no-show!
